endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/channels
endpoints.description: Returns list of channels that are available for a given platform.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/platforms
endpoints.description: Returns list of platforms that are available for a given product. The resource "product" has no resource name in its name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/releases
endpoints.description: Returns list of releases of the given version.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/versions
endpoints.description: Returns list of version for the given platform/channel.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
